item.title: Bitcoin verstehen вАУ Episode 319 - Diese 3 Probleme bereiten euch bei Bitcoin schlaflose N√§chte.
item.description:
Wir haben √Љber 300 Menschen befragt und fast 20 Einzelgespr√§che gef√Љhrt. Die Ergebnisse waren eindeutig: Bitcoin selbst ist nicht das Problem. Der Umgang damit schon. In dieser Folge teilen wir die Ergebnisse unserer Umfrage, sprechen √Љber die drei Themen die wirklich besch√§ftigen und was wir daraus mitnehmen: f√Љr euch und f√Љr uns.

Ihr m√ґchtet als Erstes wissen, sobald unsere Online-Inhalte zur L√ґsung der Probleme verf√Љgbar sind? Dann tragt euch hier in die Warteliste ein.

Jeden Montag 5 interessante Medien rund um Bitcoin & Geld sowie donnerstags die Zusammenfassung unserer aktuellen Episode in euer Postfach? Dann meldet euch zu unserem Newsletter an.

item.title: Was Bitcoin bringt - mit Niko Jilch вАУ Krieg, Inflation, Flucht: Was passiert, wenn Europa kippt? |¬†Ed Schotland
item.description:
Finanzbildung an Schulen ist Mangelware, w√§hrend Jugendliche durch digitale Verlockungen und "Buy Now, Pay Later"-Modelle immer fr√Љher in die Schuldenfalle tappen. In dieser Folge spreche ich mit dem Kinderbuchautor und P√§dagogen Ed Schotland √Љber Gelderziehung, die fundamentale Bedeutung von Bargeld im Lernprozess und die ungeschminkte Realit√§t von Inflation und schwindender Kaufkraft. Wir blicken tief in die Geldgeschichte, analysieren aktuelle geo-politische Risiken in Europa und diskutieren, warum Bitcoin in unruhigen Zeiten weit mehr als nur ein Investment darstellt вАУ n√§mlich eine echte, unzensierbare Option f√Љr pers√ґnliche Freiheit und Mobilit√§t.¬†

item.title: The Bitcoin Matrix вАУ Bitcoin Is More вАФ Tomer Strolight on Money, Rights & AI
item.description:
"Bitcoin is a rights-protection entity."

Tomer Strolight returns for his ninth visit вАФ and reads four of his own essays start to finish, with conversation in between: Bitcoin Is More, Living With AI, AI Built to Survive, and This Is Not the End.

We discuss why Bitcoin isn't a price but a superstate no government on earth can reach вАФ even as Iran floats a Bitcoin toll in the middle of a war вАФ why self-custody is the whole point, and how inflation's slow squeeze is finally being felt by everyone.

Then it turns: three short stories about living with AI, and what we surrender when we let a machine do our thinking for us.

No host intro, no warm-up. We open cold, on Tomer's voice.

item.title: The Wolf Of All Streets вАУ BitcoinвАЩs $59K Test Is Coming As Korea Crashes вАУ Caitlin Long
item.description:
Bitcoin hit a two-week low at $61,877 (-3.9%) as a brutal AI tech selloff dragged risk assets globally: South Korea's KOSPI crashed 10%, Samsung and SK Hynix each cratered 12%, and SpaceX has now lost $600 BILLION across three trading days. Bloomberg is calling Bitcoin "tied at the hip" to the AI trade вАФ the digital gold thesis is dying. Add Bank of America's bombshell call for THREE rate HIKES in 2026, the Senate passing a CBDC ban through 2030 in an 85-5 vote, and Jamie Dimon warning the bull market is a "little tsunami" вАФ and today's setup is the cleanest macro inflection we've seen all month. We break down whether Bitcoin's new AI correlation is structural, what BofA's hike call means for the cycle, and whether Trump's quantum executive order is a real threat or just optics.

Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

]]>

item.title: What Bitcoin Did вАУ The Fed Is Trapped: Why Double-Digit Inflation Is Inevitable | Lawrence Lepard
item.description:
вАЬThe whole goddamn thing is a charadeвА¶ finger in the air, wild-ass guess, total gaslighting and bullshit.вАЭ

In this episode, Lawrence Lepard is back on the show to explain why the Fed is trapped between persistent inflation, an accelerating sovereign debt crisis and a financial system that cannot withstand genuinely tight monetary policy.

Lawrence breaks down the FedвАЩs retreat from forward guidance, why its new playbook gives policymakers cover to change course without warning, and why he believes todayвАЩs hawkish stance will ultimately give way to rate cuts and more money creation.

We also explore his вАЬdecade of inflationвАЭ thesis. He argues that the cycle began in 2020, that double-digit inflation is still ahead, and that a major disruption in the Treasury or bond market could trigger a вАЬbreak-glassвАЭ response from the Fed, sending Bitcoin, gold and other hard assets dramatically higher.

In this episode:

вАҐ Why the Federal Reserve is abandoning forward guidance

вАҐ How the Fed could redefine inflation

вАҐ The sovereign debt problem

вАҐ Why double-digit inflation is coming

вАҐ Lawrence's outlook for Bitcoin and gold

item.title: Einfach Bitcoin Podcast вАУ KI und Bitcoin: Neue M√ґglichkeiten f√Љr Anleger
item.description:
---werbung---
Entdecke die pure Kraft der Natur mit Nature Heart und sichere dir jetzt 10 % Rabatt auf dein neues Lieblingsprodukt рЯМњ

https://nature-heart.de/NaturesSon

Gutscheincode: NaturesSon10
---werbung---

KI und Bitcoin: Neue M√ґglichkeiten f√Љr Anleger

Die Blockchain-Technologie hat in den letzten Jahren enorm an Bedeutung gewonnen. Sie gilt als f√§lschungssicher, da jede Transaktion √Љber ein dezentrales Nutzernetzwerk gepr√Љft und die Informationen verschl√Љsselt gespeichert werden.

Ein weiteres Thema, das k√Љrzlich f√Љr Aufsehen gesorgt hat, ist die K√Љnstliche Intelligenz (KI). Der KI-Chatbot ChatGPT und Software, die Bilder auf Basis von Text-Beschreibungen erzeugen kann, haben einen regelrechten KI-Hype ausgel√ґst.

Bitcoin und K√Љnstliche Intelligenz

Die Kombination von Bitcoin und KI er√ґffnet neue M√ґglichkeiten f√Љr Anleger. Durch die Integration von KI in die Bitcoin-Welt k√ґnnen effizientere Handelsstrategien und verbesserte Sicherheitsmechanismen entwickelt werden.

Wichtige Erkenntnisse

  • Die Verschmelzung von Bitcoin und KI bietet revolution√§re M√ґglichkeiten.
  • Neue M√§rkte werden durch die Kombination von Blockchain und KI geschaffen.
  • Die Integration von KI erm√ґglicht effizientere Handelsstrategien.
  • KI-Krypto-Projekte haben das Potenzial, die digitale Wirtschaft zu gestalten.
  • Die Synergie zwischen Blockchain und KI transformiert bestehende Branchen.
Die Verschmelzung von Zukunftstechnologien

Die Zukunft der Technologie liegt in der Verschmelzung von K√Љnstlicher Intelligenz (KI) und Blockchain. Diese beiden innovativen Technologien haben das Potenzial, verschiedene Branchen zu revolutionieren.

Was sind KI und Blockchain?

K√Љnstliche Intelligenz bezieht sich auf Systeme, die in der Lage sind, menschen√§hnliche kognitive F√§higkeiten wie Lernen, Probleml√ґsung und Mustererkennung nachzuahmen. Blockchain-Technologie hingegen ist eine dezentrale, transparente Datenbank, die Transaktionen und Informationen sicher speichert und verarbeitet.

Warum die Kombination revolution√§r ist

Die Kombination von KI und Blockchain schafft ein √Цkosystem, in dem transparente und manipulationssichere Daten durch intelligente Algorithmen analysiert und optimiert werden k√ґnnen. Dies er√ґffnet neue Chancen f√Љr Datensicherheit, Automatisierung und Effizienzsteigerung in verschiedenen Branchen.

Die Integration von Blockchain in KI-Anwendungen kann Vertrauen in die Ergebnisse und Analysen von KI-Systemen schaffen, indem sie Dezentralit√§t und Transparenz bietet. Zudem kann die Blockchain als Grundlage f√Љr dezentrale Datenmarktpl√§tze dienen, von denen KI-Systeme profitieren k√ґnnen.

Bitcoin und K√Љnstliche Intelligenz: Grundlagen verstehen

Um die M√ґglichkeiten von KI und Bitcoin vollst√§ndig zu verstehen, m√Љssen Anleger die grundlegenden Technologien hinter diesen Innovationen begreifen. Zwei Schl√Љsselkomponenten stehen hierbei im Vordergrund: die Blockchain-Technologie und K√Љnstliche Intelligenz-Systeme.

Die Blockchain-Technologie hinter Bitcoin

Die Blockchain-Technologie ist eine √ґffentlich einsehbare und geteilte Datenbank, in der Transaktionsdaten gespeichert werden. Sie gilt als f√§lschungssicher, da jede Transaktion √Љber das dezentrale Nutzernetzwerk gepr√Љft und die Informationen verschl√Љsselt gespeichert werden.

  • Bitcoin basiert auf der Blockchain-Technologie, die als dezentrales, transparentes Hauptbuch fungiert und durch kryptografische Verfahren abgesichert wird.
  • Die Blockchain hinter Bitcoin erm√ґglicht Transaktionen ohne zentrale Autorit√§t, indem sie ein Netzwerk von Computern nutzt, die Transaktionen validieren und in Bl√ґcken zusammenfassen.
KI-Systeme und ihre Funktionsweise

K√Љnstliche Intelligenz umfasst verschiedene Technologien wie maschinelles Lernen, neuronale Netzwerke und Deep Learning, die es Computern erm√ґglichen, aus Daten zu lernen und Entscheidungen zu treffen.


 | KI-Technologie | Funktionsweise | Anwendung
 | Maschinelles Lernen | Lernen aus Daten | Vorhersagemodelle
 | Neuronale Netzwerke | Komplexe Mustererkennung | Bild- und Spracherkennung
 | Deep Learning | Tiefere Datenanalyse | Finanzanalyse und -prognosen


Das Verst√§ndnis beider Technologien ist entscheidend, um ihr Zusammenspiel und die daraus resultierenden M√ґglichkeiten f√Љr Anleger zu erfassen. Durch die Kombination von KI und Blockchain k√ґnnen Anleger von verbesserten Analysem√ґglichkeiten und sichereren Transaktionen profitieren.

item.title: TFTC: A Bitcoin Podcast вАУ Ten31 Timestamp: Bitcoin and the Red Queen
item.description:
The Iran deal looked like a breakthrough until both sides started spinning it within the hour, but oil kept falling and the dollar stayed bid anyway. Marty and John walk through a week of narrative violations, from WTI dropping into the mid seventies to Fed Chair Warsh's hawkish first FOMC press conference. They dig into why hyperscaler CapEx exploding while free cash flow collapses makes Volcker 2.0 impossible, how housing affordability and debt service are pushing the Fed and Treasury back together, and why frontier AI is now a state secret. They also check in on Bitcoin's quiet grind, with Taiwan's central bank exploring reserves and BlackRock still building products in the background.

рЯФЧ https://bitcoinproducts.com

In this episode:

  • Iran MOU signed and immediately disputed
  • Oil crashing below $75 and the dollar narrative violation
  • Warsh's first FOMC, hawkish dot plot, and stripped down guidance
  • Hyperscaler CapEx surging while free cash flow dries up
  • Housing affordability and why Volcker 2.0 is off the table
  • Fed Treasury accord and the debt service constraint
  • AI treated as national security, Fable 5 pulled from allies
  • Bitcoin range bound while institutions and policymakers build

TIMESTAMPS:

00:00:00 - Nickelback and Father's Day

00:00:43 - Iran MOU signed and disputed

00:01:31 - JD Vance delegation drama

00:02:18 - Oil breaking below $80

00:03:35 - Dollar strength and DXY

00:04:21 - Tactical pause theory for midterms

00:05:21 - Narrative violations everywhere

00:07:37 - US capital markets versus China

00:08:20 - Warsh's hawkish FOMC debut

00:09:33 - Stripping out forward guidance

00:10:31 - Balance sheet task force

00:11:38 - Hyperscaler CapEx versus free cash flow

00:13:35 - Meta Google Microsoft AI disarray

00:16:33 - Housing affordability crunch

00:18:44 - Fed Treasury accord

00:19:40 - Debt service and non discretionary spend

00:22:49 - AI export controls and Fable 5

00:24:28 - Bessent NATO and Cuba reforms

00:26:51 - Bitcoin range bound grind

00:28:14 - Taiwan central bank and Begich AMO bill

00:29:15 - BlackRock Franklin Templeton products

00:30:02 - Closing thoughts

SUBSCRIBE

вАЇ Newsletter (free): https://tftc.io/bitcoin-brief/

вАЇ YouTube: https://youtube.com/@TFTC?sub_confirmation=1

FOLLOW US

вАЇ X: https://x.com/tftc21

вАЇ Nostr: https://primal.net/tftc

FOLLOW MARTY

вАЇ X: https://x.com/MartyBent

вАЇ Timestamp: https://www.ten31timestamp.com/

вАЇ John Arnold: https://x.com/JohnArnoldTen31

вАЇ Ten31: https://ten31.xyz

TFTC #MartyBent #JohnArnold #Bitcoin #IranDeal #Oil #FederalReserve #AI #Anthropic #Geopolitics

]]>

рЯХС¬†TIMESTAMPS

00:00 - The Tipping Point for Mass Awakening

04:25 - Understanding the Fiat System and Its Impact

08:45 - Nihilism and the Psychological Effects of Fiat Money

Bram Kanstein and Gus Boldrini discuss why fiat money quietly rewires people into nihilism, debt, and short-term thinking. They map the slow boil, money printing, 1971, the Fed, and why inflation finally forces attention. Gus frames Bitcoin as psychological relief, time preference, and a way to get your time back through DCA and self-custody. They confront institutional adoption, ETFs, stablecoins, and the Clarity Act as legitimacy ramps. The close lands on staying humble, stacking sats, and building conviction before the bag holders wake up.

Drei Erhebungswellen. 35 Tiefen-Interviews. 1.207 codierte Einzelbelege. item.title: Bankless вАУ AI, Surveillance, and the Fight for Digital Sovereignty | Near's Illia Polosukhin
item.description:
What happens when powerful AI requires an ID, governments can restrict access by country, and your most private data flows through centralized systems? NEAR co-founder Illia Polosukhin joins David to explain why AI export controls could fracture the internet, how nationalized AI could become a surveillance layer, and why decentralized, user-owned AI may be the only real alternative. They also unpack Ironclaw, confidential inference, private agents, and NEARвАЩs push to make AI and assets fully sovereign.

item.title: Stephan Livera Podcast вАУ Using Bitcoin to Change the World: UHNW Philanthropy, Stewardship & Generational Legacy w/ Matt McClintock & Alla Futterman (Bespoke Group) SLP745
item.description:
Matt McClintock (Founder & CEO of Bespoke Group) returns to the show alongside Alla Futterman (Associate Client Relationship Manager & Head of Philanthropy Operations) fresh off his main-stage talk at BTC Prague 2026 titled вАЬUsing Bitcoin to Change the World.вАЭ

In this deep dive, we explore how ultra-high-net-worth Bitcoiners and their families are moving beyond simple HODLing to become active stewards вАФ deploying Bitcoin through sophisticated, values-aligned philanthropy to solve real problems (landmine clearance, human trafficking recovery, wildlife protection, cultural preservation, and more).

We unpack Bespoke GroupвАЩs вАЬWealth Operating System,вАЭ sovereign estate planning for bearer assets, tax-efficient giving structures, next-gen involvement, the mindset shift from ownership to вАЬthis wealth has been entrusted to me,вАЭ and practical advice for Bitcoiners at every level who want their capital to outlive them and actually improve the world.

If youвАЩve ever wondered how to turn Bitcoin conviction into lasting generational impact while keeping sovereignty and privacy intact, this is the episode.

Timestamps:

(00:00) - Introduction to Bitcoin Philanthropy

(06:38) - Tax-Efficient Philanthropy Strategies

(13:07) - Charitable Structures for Bitcoin

(20:22) - Mindset Shifts in Bitcoin Philanthropy

(27:22) - Wealth Stewardship and Bitcoin

(32:13) - Challenges in Bitcoin Philanthropy

(37:23) - Engaging the Next Generation in Philanthropy

(39:49) - Practical Tips for Everyday Bitcoiners

¬†¬†

Links:¬†

  • Bespoke Group вЖТ https://bespokegroup.io/

  • MattвАЩs article: вАЬHow Bitcoin Wealth is Changing the WorldвАЭ (June 2026)

  • AllaвАЩs article: вАЬPhilanthropy as Wealth in MotionвАЭ

  • https://x.com/mcclintock_m

Stephan Livera links:

  • Follow me on X: @stephanlivera

  • Subscribe to the podcast

  • Subscribe to Substack

]]>

item.title: Nodesignal - Deine Bitcoin-Frequenz вАУ Nodesignal-Spezial - E286 - In 21 Folgen die Antwort auf die H√§lfte von Allem
item.description:
In diesem Finale der vierten Staffel Nodesignal werfen Martin, Thorsten, Chris, Calso und Zetti einen Blick zur√Љck auf die letzten 20 Folgen des Podcasts. Was hat uns gefallen, welche Schwierigkeiten sind aufgetaucht und wo hadern wird. Au√Яerdem stellt sich der neue Praktikant Karsten ausf√Љhrlich vor und erkl√§rt, wie er zu Bitcoin und Nodesignal gekommen ist. Solltet ihr also wissen wollen, was die Crew kurz vor der Sommerpause bewegt und wie es danach weitergehen soll, h√ґrt gerne mal rein. Als Schmankerl findet ihr am Ende einen neuen Metalsong und die n√§chste Runde Boosts.

Von und mit:

- Calso

- Zettizettler

- Thorsten вЪ°пЄП

- ChrisвЪ°SHA256

- Karsten

- Martin Betz

Hier k√ґnnt ihr uns eine Spende √Љber Lightning da lassen: вЪ°пЄПnodesignal@getalby.com

Zus√§tzlich haben wir auch einen Silent Payment Link: sp1qq0a2rles9y32ffmj0eawvjglgqsgj7hq99ers580l98k42a7rh9szq3sa50fh2e5lwf22fxcjy0qw88u72vlj328qr39da245sq4nrskuqvvv5l4

Neben dem Podcast findet ihr uns auch auf YouTube

F√Љr Feedback und weitergehenden Diskussionen kommt gerne in die Telegramgruppe von Nodesignal und bewertet uns bei Spotify und Apple Podcasts, das hilft uns sehr. Folgt uns auch gerne bei Nostr:npub1n0devk3h2l3rx6vmt24a3lz4hsxp7j8rn3x44jkx6daj7j8jzc0q2u02cy und Twitter.

  • Blockzeit: 953817
  • Neue Nodesignal Community Seite f√Љr Release Boosting, Boost2Unlock und Booster Leaderboard
  • Themenvorschl√§ge k√ґnnen √Љber den Telegram Bot eingestellt werden
  • Sommerfest auf dem souver√§nen Hof

Timestamps:

item.title: Bitcoin Audible.DE - Die besten Bitcoin-Artikel, vorgelesen in deutscher Sprache! вАУ 208. Martin Connor - Bitcoin, das ultimative Kollateral
item.description:
von Martin Connor вАУ Originaltitel: ¬ЂBitcoin: The Ultimate Collateral¬Ђ

*вАЮDie beste, einfachste вАУ ultimative вАУ Form der Kreditsicherheit ist etwas, das sofort beansprucht und verkauft werden kann, wenn der Schuldner seine Zahlungen nicht leistet. Der Verkauf eines Hauses kann Monate oder sogar Jahre dauern. Auch Aktien haben zeitliche Beschr√§nkungen. Bitcoin jedoch nicht. Bitcoin ist immer in BewegungвАЬ
*

(Martin Connor)

Wenn man Bitcoin als hartes, in seinem Kern nicht ver√§nderbares oder manipulierbares Asset begreift, welche M√ґglichkeiten er√ґffnen sich dadurch? Das Buch вАЮBitcoin: Die ultimative KreditsicherheitвАЬ untersucht, wie die Bereiche Bitcoin und Kreditvergabe perfekt zusammenpassen. Etwa, wie Bitcoin-Besitzer und Bitcoin-Unternehmen den maximalen Wert aus ihren Bitcoins herausholen k√ґnnen, ohne sie verkaufen zu m√Љssen.

Wir lesen ein Kapitel aus diesem Buch, das eine zentrale Idee beleuchtet: Bitcoin als die beste Sicherheit, die die Menschheit je hatte. Die meisten Menschen denken beim Thema ¬ЂSicherheit¬ї an H√§user, Aktien, Gold und Bargeld вАУ aber weil es scheinbar nichts Besseres gab, √Љbersehen sie deren enorme Schw√§chen. Die Kombination der Elemente von Multisignatur вАУ echtes gemeinsames Eigentum, perfekte digitale Knappheit, Portabilit√§t und die un√Љbertroffene Verf√Љgbarkeit von Bitcoin вАУ unterscheidet es grundlegend von herk√ґmmlichen Besicherungsmodellen.

Verkaufe Deine Bitcoins niemals вАУ lebe davon.

Weitere Empfehlungen:

  • Pierre Rochard: ¬ЂDer Nutzen des Sparens¬ї (Ep. #019)
  • Tomer Strolight: ¬ЂWarum Bitcoin?¬ї (Ep. #80-82)
  • Saifedean Ammous: ¬ЂF√Љr eine R√Љckkehr zu niedriger Zeitpr√§ferenz¬ї (Ep. #77)
  • Pierre Rochard: ¬ЂBitcoin vs. Gold¬ї (Ep. #71)
  • Hans-Hermann Hoppe: ¬ЂDer Ertrag aus gespartem Geld вАУ neu √Љberdacht¬ї (Ep. #18)
  • Parker Lewis: ¬ЂDie ¬ЂBezahlвАШ mich in Bitcoin!¬ї-Theorie¬ї (#140)
  • Parker Lewis: ¬ЂBitcoin-Zahlungen: Die вАєJemand ist der N√§chsteвАЇ-Logik¬ї (#151)
  • HodlHodl.com f√Љr Belehnung von Bitcoin, ebenso wie Unchained Capital, Ledn, Firefish etc.

Abonniere BitcoinAudible.de und empfehle unsere Vorlesungen jedem, der/die sich f√Љr Bitcoin interessiert. Hilf damit auch anderen, Bitcoin von einem starken monet√§ren, wirtschaftlichen und philosophischen Fundament aus zu erkunden.

Unterst√Љtze bitte unser Projekt und sende uns Sats via Lightning oder n√Љtze eine der anderen Optionen.

Tipp: Bitcoin nur mehr KYC-frei kaufen! Auf HodlHodl.com ist das recht einfach, und mit Anmeldung √Љber den obigen Link reduziert Du dar√Љber hinaus sogar auch die Spesen f√Љr Deine ersten K√§ufe dort.

]]>

  • Hans-Hermann Hoppe: ¬ЂDer Ertrag aus gespartem Geld вАУ neu √Љberdacht¬ї (Ep. #18)
  • Parker Lewis: ¬ЂDie ¬ЂBezahlвАШ mich in Bitcoin!¬ї-Theorie¬ї (#140)
  • Parker Lewis: ¬ЂBitcoin-Zahlungen: Die вАєJemand ist der N√§chsteвАЇ-Logik¬ї (#151)
  • HodlHodl.com f√Љr Belehnung von Bitcoin, ebenso wie Unchained Capital, Ledn, Firefish etc.

Abonniere BitcoinAudible.de und empfehle unsere Vorlesungen jedem, der/die sich f√Љr Bitcoin interessiert. Hilf damit auch anderen, Bitcoin von einem starken monet√§ren, wirtschaftlichen und philosophischen Fundament aus zu erkunden.

Unterst√Љtze bitte unser Projekt und sende uns Sats via Lightning oder n√Љtze eine der anderen Optionen.

Tipp: Bitcoin nur mehr KYC-frei kaufen! Auf HodlHodl.com ist das recht einfach, und mit Anmeldung √Љber den obigen Link reduziert Du dar√Љber hinaus sogar auch die Spesen f√Љr Deine ersten K√§ufe dort.

item.title: Rob Wallace | Bitcoin News вАУ Most Bitcoiners Will End Up Broke вАФ Why 78% Losing Everything | Grant Cardone
item.description:
Grant Cardone says the biggest financial lie ever told is: вАЬSave your money.вАЭ

While most people are taught to save cash, Grant argues that cash is constantly losing purchasing power and that the wealthy play a completely different game. Instead of saving, they acquire assets, use debt strategically, and convert fiat into things they believe will outperform inflation.

In this interview, Grant breaks down:

вАҐ Why saving money can actually make you poorer

вАҐ The difference between scarcity and abundance thinking

вАҐ How wealthy people use debt differently

вАҐ Why he is bullish on Bitcoin

вАҐ The Bitcoin + real estate strategy he believes could change investing

вАҐ The biggest mistakes investors make

вАҐ How AI, Bitcoin, and hard assets could reshape wealth creation

Whether you agree with him or not, GrantвАЩs views on money, Bitcoin, investing, and entrepreneurship challenge almost everything most people have been taught.

рЯЯ£ Plays SatsDrop from Rhino and win FREE Bitcoin today рЯСЙ https://bit.ly/3Sndb1T

]]>

item.title: Dein Weg zu Bitcoin вАУ Frauen sind die bessern Investoren! - Traut (es) euch (zu)! вАУ Dein Weg zu Bitcoin mit Marie von Bose
item.description:
Marie hat genau das gemacht, was viele sich nicht trauen: Sie hat den sicheren Angestelltenjob hinter sich gelassen und sich als Crypto-Traderin selbstst√§ndig gemacht. Doch der eigentliche Wendepunkt kam mit einer einfachen Frage: вАЮWarum √Љberlasse ich meine Finanzen eigentlich anderen?"In dieser Folge erz√§hlt Marie ihre pers√ґnliche Reise вАУ von Glaubenss√§tzen ums Geld (вАЮ√Ьber Geld spricht man nicht"), √Љber erste zaghafte Schritte mit Altcoins bis hin zu einem klaren Bekenntnis: Bitcoin als Wertspeicher, der unabh√§ngig macht. Ein Gespr√§ch √Љber Mut, Vorbild sein, Geschichte (was hat 1977 mit deiner Freiheit zu tun?) вАУ und die Frage: Was geben wir der n√§chsten Generation eigentlich wirklich mit?

рЯІ† Themen in der Episode:вЬЕ Maries Weg vom Getreidehandel ins Crypto-Trading вЬЕ Warum Frauen am Kapitalmarkt untersch√§tzt werden вАУ und wo ihre echten St√§rken liegen вЬЕ Trading als Handwerk: Was es wirklich braucht (Spoiler: Geduld und viel Lernen) вЬЕ Blockchain im Alltag: Vom Konzertticket √Љber die Immobilie bis zur R√Љckverfolgbarkeit von Kaffee вЬЕ Glaubenss√§tze ums Geld вАУ und wie man sie aufl√ґst вЬЕ Pers√ґnlichkeitsentwicklung als вАЮEndgegner" beim Trading вЬЕ Warum 1977 ein Schl√Љsseljahr f√Љr finanzielle Selbstbestimmung war вЬЕ Vorbild f√Љr die eigenen T√ґchter sein вАУ und f√Љr andere Frauen

рЯТђ Zitat der Folge: вАЮBitcoin ist ein absolut genialer Wertspeicher, der mich maximal flexibel und unabh√§ngig sein l√§sst."рЯУ≤ Marie von Bose findet ihr hier:рЯФЧ Instagram: @cryptosaloon.techвЬ® Unser Ziel: Bitcoin verst√§ndlich und greifbar machen durch Geschichten, die jeder nachvollziehen kann und die zeigen, dass die ersten Schritte nicht gro√Я sein m√Љssen und dass jeder Zweifel am Anfang hatte. Sie stellen keine Finanz- oder Anlageberatung im Sinne einschl√§giger Vorschriften dar.Alle dargestellten Inhalte spiegeln ausschlie√Яlich pers√ґnliche Einsch√§tzungen wider. Jede Zuh√ґrerin und jeder Zuh√ґrer handelt eigenverantwortlich und tr√§gt die volle Verantwortung f√Љr eigene Investitionsentscheidungen.Bitte beachte: Bitcoin ist volatil und Investitionen k√ґnnen zu Verlusten f√Љhren.Informiere dich umfassend und bilde dir eine eigene Meinung, bevor du finanzielle Entscheidungen triffst.Ein zentraler Grundsatz lautet: Study Bitcoin.Partner:рЯІ°Bitcoin21 вАУ stylische Bitcoin Kleidung:Mit dem Code FINANZB bekommst du 10 % Rabatt auf deine gesamte Bestellung. https://bitcoin21.shop/?ref=FINANZB рЯІ°Coinfinity вАУ Bitcoin B√ґrse :https://coinfinity.co/bitcoin-appCode: FINANZB - Damit sparst du 21 % deiner Geb√Љhren in den ersten 6 Monaten.рЯІ°21statues вАУ Bitcoin Lampen und Statuen:https://21statues.de?sca_ref=10285598.SH2VZ7SHVa8Code: FINANZB - Du sparst 5 % auf alle ProdukteWeitere Empfehlungen und Codes:рЯІ°BitBox вАУ Cold Wallet:https://shop.bitbox.swiss/?ref=tfjnborqCode: FINANZB - Du sparst 5 % auf alle ProdukteрЯІ°Seedor вАУ Backup-L√ґsung in Stahl:https://www.seedor.io/discount/FINANZB Code: FINANZB - Du sparst 5 % auf alle ProdukteрЯІ°21Bitcoin вАУ Bitcoin B√ґrse: https://21bitcoin.app.link/invite/?code=LEBENMITBITCOINCode: LEBENMITBITCOIN - Damit sparst du bis zu 21 % deiner Geb√Љhren.

item.title: Onramp Bitcoin Media вАУ Franklin Templeton's New Bitcoin Product & The Truth Behind AI
item.description:
Connect with Early Riders вАФ https://www.earlyriders.com/contact
Connect with Onramp вАФ https://onrampbitcoin.com/contact-us/
Presented collaboratively by Early Riders & Onramp MediaвА¶
Final Settlement is a weekly podcast covering capital markets, dealmaking, early-stage venture, bitcoin applications and protocol development.
This week Brian, Michael, and Liam cover Anthropic's Mythos and Fable controversy and the orchestrated open-source-vs-frontier AI dynamic (Microsoft eyeing DeepSeek for enterprise, Japan's Sakana Fugu launch, Goldman's 24x token forecast by 2030), Franklin Templeton's new ETFs that auto-invest stock dividends into Bitcoin, Fidelity and State Street's entry into stablecoin reserve management, Illinois Governor Pritzker's 0.2% crypto wealth tax, the Fed's 130-page stablecoin KYC rulemaking, Binance's MiCA expulsion, Coinbase's tokenized-stocks rollout, SpaceX's IPO run and $60B Cursor acquisition, and the latest on Strategy's stretch product.
Chapters
00:00 - Introduction and Current Events
03:04 - Anthropic's Mythos and Fable Controversy
05:58 - The Role of Open Source in AI
08:54 - AI Models and National Security Concerns
11:54 - Microsoft's Strategic Moves in AI
14:57 - The Future of AI Infrastructure
17:55 - The Dynamics of AI Token Consumption
21:06 - Emerging AI Technologies and Market Trends
24:10 - Japan's Entry into AI with Sakana Fugu
27:11 - Open Source Challenges and GitHub Controversy
30:31 - Merging Money and AI for Market Success
32:08 - Stablecoin Management: Fidelity and State Street's Moves
33:59 - Innovative ETF: Dividends into Bitcoin
38:48 - Regulatory Challenges: Illinois Crypto Tax
42:52 - Stablecoin Issuer Regulations and KYC
48:54 - Tokenized Stocks: Coinbase's New Offering
50:53 - SpaceX's Rapid Growth and Market Dynamics
If you found this valuable, please subscribe to Early Riders Insights for access to the best content in the ecosystem weekly: https://www.earlyriders.com/research
Keep up with Michael:
https://x.com/MTanguma
Keep up with Liam:
https://x.com/Lnelson_21
Keep up with Brian:
https://x.com/BackslashBTC

]]>

item.title: Swan Signal Live - A Bitcoin Show вАУ The Fed Held, BITA Launched, STRC is Stressed
item.description:
• Brady and John open with World Cup talk, including CanadaвАЩs first-ever World Cup win, the U.S. matchup, and how the tournament is challenging global stereotypes about America
  • Bitcoin sentiment is notably weak, with price around $62K and many market participants expecting a four-year-cycle-style bottom later in 2026
  • John outlines possible causes of the sell-off, including whale selling, miner selling, AI stock flows, and reflexive belief in the four-year cycle
  • The hosts compare this drawdown to 2022, noting that todayвАЩs decline feels less explainable than the Fed tightening, inflation, and crypto collapses of the prior bear market
  • They discuss Kevin WarshвАЩs first Fed meeting, unchanged rates, mixed dot plots, and the possibility that inflation remains above target until 2028
  • Lyn AldenвАЩs CNBC appearance is highlighted, especially her view that major balance sheet reduction is unlikely and that much of BitcoinвАЩs leverage-driven pain may already be behind us
  • BlackRockвАЩs new Bitcoin income ETF is discussed as another sign that Wall Street continues building Bitcoin products, even if the product may not suit every investor
  • StrategyвАЩs Stretch preferred stock volatility is analyzed, with John arguing the situation is serious but not existential for Strategy
  • SpaceXвАЩs IPO and 18,712 BTC holdings are discussed as another example of unique founder-led companies holding Bitcoin
  • Swan announces RBX, Real Bitcoin Exchange, a product designed to help ETF holders, especially GBTC holders, exchange shares for real Bitcoin in a tax-efficient, in-kind process

item.title: The Bitcoin Broadcast вАУ Bitcoin's History | Who Is Satoshi? | Epstein's Involvement | BlockSize Wars | Kurt Wuckert Jr.
item.description:
This episode is a deep-dive conversation with Bitcoin historian Kurt Wuckert Jr. covering the history, ideology, and future of Bitcoin. It starts with KurtвАЩs origin story in the early days of Bitcoin, then moves into the technical and political battles around block size, scalability, and decentralization. They also get into Satoshi NakamotoвАЩs writings, the evolution of BitcoinвАЩs original capabilities, and KurtвАЩs view that Bitcoin could have powered far more of todayвАЩs crypto ecosystem if those features had remained intact.A big part of the episode is KurtвАЩs contrarian take on Bitcoin history: he argues that many вАЬnewвАЭ crypto ideas were already possible on Bitcoin, discusses the block size wars from a big-block perspective, and explains why he thinks Bitcoin should be more useful for everyday payments. The conversation also touches on the Epstein/Blockstream/MIT funding controversy and KurtвАЩs long-running attempt to understand who Satoshi was and why that identity has become such a sensitive subject. The episode closes with a forward-looking discussion about BitcoinвАЩs future, mining economics, and the possibility of scaling Bitcoin for far more real-world use.Follow Me on X: https://x.com/HodlFloridaSubscribe on YouTube: вА™вА™вА™вА™вА™вА™вА™вА™вА™вА™вА™вА™¬†@TheBTCBroadcast¬† Follow me on IG: https://www.instagram.com/thebitcoinbroadcast/Guest's Socials:X: https://x.com/kurtwuckertjrYouTube: вА™¬†@Kurtwuckertjr¬† Website: https://kurtwuckertjr.com/Sponsors:Protect Your Seed Phrase with MicroSeed: https://microseed.io/?ref=TBBUse Code "TBB" for 5% off your MicroSeedBitcoin Well: https://bitcoinwell.com/referral/vincehuntChapters00:00 Introduction to Kurt Wuckert Jr.03:02 Kurt's Journey into Bitcoin06:09 The Fascinating History of Bitcoin08:54 The Block Size Wars Explained13:11 The Impact of Block Size Decisions17:52 Bitcoin's Future and Its Disruptive Potential21:52 The Epstein Connection to Bitcoin34:06 The Speculation Around Satoshi's Identity35:26 The Quest to Uncover Satoshi Nakamoto38:39 The Legacy of Satoshi Nakamoto39:39 Controversial Ideas from Satoshi43:06 Theories on Satoshi's Identity51:21 The Future of Bitcoin and Its ChallengesFor Entertainment Purposes Only. item.itunes:summary:
This episode is a deep-dive conversation with Bitcoin historian Kurt Wuckert Jr. covering the history, ideology, and future of Bitcoin. It starts with KurtвАЩs origin story in the early days of Bitcoin, then moves into the technical and political battles around block size, scalability, and decentralization. They also get into Satoshi NakamotoвАЩs writings, the evolution of BitcoinвАЩs original capabilities, and KurtвАЩs view that Bitcoin could have powered far more of todayвАЩs crypto ecosystem if those features had remained intact.A big part of the episode is KurtвАЩs contrarian take on Bitcoin history: he argues that many вАЬnewвАЭ crypto ideas were already possible on Bitcoin, discusses the block size wars from a big-block perspective, and explains why he thinks Bitcoin should be more useful for everyday payments. The conversation also touches on the Epstein/Blockstream/MIT funding controversy and KurtвАЩs long-running attempt to understand who Satoshi was and why that identity has become such a sensitive subject. item.title: The Bitcoin Frontier вАУ Inside Wall StreetвАЩs bitcoin playbook with Denny Galindo
item.description:
Denny is a wealth manager and bitcoin research lead at Morgan Stanley, where he bridges traditional finance and bitcoin for high-net-worth investors. He operates inside one of the worldвАЩs largest financial institutions while developing frameworks to help advisors understand and allocate to bitcoin.

In this episode, Denny joins The Bitcoin Frontier to share how investors should think about bitcoin in a portfolio, the three core investor buckets driving adoption, and his thoughts on determining whether youвАЩre underweight or overweight bitcoin. We dig into bitcoinвАЩs market cycles and seasonal framework, the role of global money supply in driving returns, and practical strategies for gaining exposure in a volatile asset.

SUPPORT THE PODCAST:

48:30 вАУ How to build a position: dollar-cost averaging and timing
52:15 вАУ Seasons of bitcoin: winter, spring, and portfolio adjustments
55:00 вАУ What it takes for bitcoin to become a standard portfolio allocation

item.title: Unchained вАУ How Digital Credit Assets like STRC and SATA Differ from Bitcoin or DAT Stocks
item.description:
Was Michael Saylor wrong to sell Bitcoin? Matt Cole breaks from his fellow critics on Strategy, S&P's junk rating on MSTR, and whether the model is breaking.

========================================================

Thank you to our sponsor!

  • вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†FidelityвБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†: Fidelity has been building in crypto and DeFi since 2014 вАФ now they're hiring. Explore career opportunities at one of the most forward-thinking names in finance here: вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†crypto.fidelitycareers.comвБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†.

  • вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†CapeвБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†: Your biggest crypto vulnerability isn't your wallet, it's your phone number. Cape is America's privacy-first mobile carrier that rotates your SIM identity daily and blocks SIM swaps before they happen. Get 33% off your first six months at cape.co/unchained (use code: UNCHAINED).

========================================================

Strive's Matt Cole had just lived through what he called the most difficult day in the history of digital credit when he sat down to defend it. STRC had touched $82.50, SATA had slipped into the low nineties, and the Bitcoin treasury trade was suddenly the most argued-over corner of crypto.

Cole came from a pension background and built Strive into one of the largest Bitcoin treasury companies around a single conviction: that structured credit can solve an income problem fiat can't. The critics, he argues, can't even agree with each other on what is actually wrong.

Was last week a leverage liquidation or a crack in the model? Did Michael Saylor quietly change his story? And is wrapping Bitcoin in preferred stock a betrayal of its ethos or the bridge most people actually need? Laura Shin pressed on all of it.


Host:

  • вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†Laura ShinвБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†, Host / Unchained

Guests:

  • вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†вБ†Matt Cole - Chairman and CEO of Strive


Timestamps

рЯОЩпЄП 02:07 What Strive is, and why Matt calls SATA the company's main product

рЯП¶ 10:16 Could Strive cut SATA's 13% yield without breaking par?

рЯС• 15:45 Who is actually buying SATA, and the one buyer Matt says he's never met

рЯУ£ 25:15 Fidelity: Explore crypto careers and make the decision that could change your future at https://crypto.fidelitycareers.com

рЯФТ 25:58 Cape: Use code unchained for 33% off at https://cape.co/unchained

рЯТІ 27:28 What Matt thinks really drove last week's STRC drop, and why SATA didn't follow

вЪЦпЄП 50:53 Is buying SATA un-Bitcoin? Matt answers the Mallers vs Saylor critique

item.title: The Pomp Podcast вАУ Will The Bitcoin Bear Market Ever End? | Anthony Pompliano
item.description:
Anthony Pompliano breaks down the bitcoin bear market вАФ what's driving it, how long it could last, and why the data suggests we may be closer to the end than most people think. He pulls in takes from Michael Saylor, Jordi Visser, and Grant Cardone on capital rotation into AI, bitcoin sentiment, miner signals, and what history says about where we go from here.

===================

Arch Public is an agentic trading platform that automates the buying and selling of your preferred crypto strategies. Sign up today at https://www.archpublic.com and start your automated trading strategy for free. No catch. No hidden fees. Just smarter trading.

item.title: Der Bitcoin Kompass: Wegweiser im Kaninchenbau вАУ Folge 5: Der Bitcoin-Preis вАУ Zwischen Angebot, Nachfrage und Geldpolitik
item.description:
Was bestimmt eigentlich den Bitcoin-Preis? In Folge 5 vom Bitcoin-Kompass sprechen wir √Љeber eines der meistdiskutierten Themen im Bitcoin-Space: den Preis. Dabei geht es nicht um Prognosen oder Kaufempfehlungen, sondern um ein grundlegendes Verst√§ndnis daf√Љer, wie der Bitcoin-Preis entsteht und welche Kraefte ihn beeinflussen.


Wir erkl√§ren, wie Angebot und Nachfrage auf Bitcoin-B√ґrsen funktionieren, warum das Handelsvolumen oft wichtiger ist als der Preis selbst und welche Rolle die Marktkapitalisierung spielt. Ausserdem beleuchten wir die grossen Einflussfaktoren: das Bitcoin-Halving und den Vier-Jahres-Zyklus, die Geldpolitik der US-Notenbank (Fed), Inflation und die wachsenden Staatsschulden der USA. Im Vergleich zwischen Bitcoin und Gold zeigen sie, warum Bitcoin technologisch ueberlegen sein k√ґnnte - und warum der Preis letztlich ein Spiegel des wachsenden Vertrauens in diese neue Technologie ist.


Mehr Infos, interaktive Grafiken zur Marktkapitalisierung und Kontaktmoeglichkeiten findet ihr auf:


Webseite: https://derbitcoinkompass.ch

E-Mail: kontakt@derbitcoinkompass.ch

Telegram: https://t.me/btc_kaninchenbau


Feedback und Fragen gerne per E-Mail, ueber Telegram oder ueber unsere Webseite.



(00:00:00) Begruessung & Einfuehrung ins Thema Preis

(00:01:31) Volatilitaet und der aktuelle Bitcoin-Preis

(00:02:33) Kaufkraft, Inflation und warum Menschen investieren

(00:05:20) Marktkapitalisierung: Bitcoin vs. Gold vs. Immobilien vs. Aktien

(00:08:05) Wie entsteht der Bitcoin-Preis? Angebot & Nachfrage erklaert

(00:11:04) Warum das Handelsvolumen entscheidend ist

(00:12:43) Die grossen Einflussfaktoren auf den Bitcoin-Preis

(00:13:26) In was messen wir den Preis? Euro, Dollar oder Aepfel?

(00:17:03) Warum Geld kein stabiler Massstab ist

(00:18:10) Bitcoins festes Angebot: Maximal 21 Millionen

(00:20:02) Das Halving und der Vier-Jahres-Zyklus

(00:24:22) Die Fed, Zinspolitik und US-Staatsschulden

(00:31:27) Was bedeutet das alles fuer den Bitcoin-Preis?

(00:33:37) Bitcoin vs. Gold: Vorteile und Unterschiede

(00:40:30) Preisprognose: Bitcoin auf 1 Million Dollar?

(00:41:54) Zusammenfassung & Verabschiedung

]]>

item.title: The Mustard Seed Bitcoin Podcast вАУ After the AI Buildout, the AI Economy Will Run on Bitcoin Collateral | Eric Jackson
item.description:
Eric Jackson joins Joe Burnett to explain why he believes bitcoin could reach $50 million as AI agents transform global commerce and demand pristine digital collateral. They also discuss bitcoinвАЩs recent underperformance, AI-powered market models, compounding through volatility, and why the next five years may be the most uncertain investing environment of our lifetimes.

0:00 - Eric JacksonвАЩs background in markets

2:14 - Finding Carvana before the comeback

12:16 - Why Eric thinks bitcoin could reach $50 million

54:15 - Final thoughts and where to follow Eric

]]>

item.title: Bitcoiners - Live From Bitcoin Beach вАУ Is Bitcoin Backed by Anything? How a Coffee Farm in El Salvador Proved Peter Schiff Wrong
item.description:
Can Bitcoin save traditional farming from total collapse? El Salvador's Cherito (@CheritoCafe) de-financialized his supply chain, uses a Bitcoin circular economy to bypass banks, and runs nodes inside his coffee lab!¬†

In this episode, we sit down with Jorge, globally recognized in the community as Cherito, to dissect how legacy financial institutions manipulate commodity pricing to trap agricultural families in a perpetual cycle of poverty after leaving a lucrative technology and finance career in Seattle to return home to El Salvador. We took a look at how he is merging specialty coffee, agroecology, and a peer-to-peer Bitcoin standard to build an automated, zero-fiat circular economy from the ground up.¬†

Faced with total ruin from systemic economic decay and a devastating agricultural plague, Jorge realized that the only path to survival was to completely opt out of the generic commodity market by fundamentally restructuring how high-end specialty coffee is valued. Through the launch of the Bio Crop Project, he pioneered a localized framework that prioritizes biological resilience and ancestral agroecology over industrial chemicals and corporate-controlled seed monopolies, proving that wealth creation requires physical sacrifice, strategic crop diversification, and an unyielding commitment to local food independence.

To fully protect this model from predatory global inflation, Jorge took absolute control of his supply chain by vertically integrating everything from the volcanic soil to direct international exporting. He breaks down how shielding delicate bean profiles from corporate exploitation relies entirely on understanding how to leverage the distinct microclimate and high-altitude terroir of El Salvador's mountains. By taking his message directly to global academic panels and roaster guilds, he transformed a vulnerable, localized crop into a premium global asset capable of dictating its own fair valuation on international markets.

The structural revolution took place when this physical infrastructure collided with a digital, sound money standard right here in El Zonte. Jorge explains how finding the Bitcoin whitepaper provided the missing link for his business, allowing him to establish a completely self-sustaining circular economy that operates entirely outside the legacy banking grid. By anchoring his operations to a peer-to-peer electronic cash network, he successfully eliminated credit card processing traps, currency devaluation risks, and international wire delays, allowing his business to reallocate bank fees directly into the pockets of his local workers.

We wrap up the conversation inside his newly launched flagship facility, where the boundaries of a traditional business are being completely redrawn through onsite coffee roasting, active ASIC miners, and a live blockchain node visualizer. We also dive into the fascinating history of his beautifully restored 1974 GM Cherito truck, which is a rare piece of Salvadorean automotive engineering that embodies absolute scarcity. Finally, Jorge reveals the genius behind upcycling discarded fruit skins into a refreshing, antioxidant-rich beverage the community now proudly calls "Bitcoin Libre", proving that under a true proof-of-work standard, absolutely nothing goes to waste.


вАФBitcoin Beach Team


Learn more about Cherito:
X: https://x.com/CheritoCafe
Web: https://www.cheritocafe.com/
IG: https://www.instagram.com/cheritocafe.sv


Support and follow Bitcoin Beach:
X: https://www.twitter.com/BitcoinBeach
IG: https://www.instagram.com/bitcoinbeach_sv¬†
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@livefrombitcoinbeach¬†
Web: https://www.bitcoinbeach.com¬†


Browse through this quick guide to learn more about the episode:
00:00 Intro
01:25 Why do tech professionals quit fiat careers for El Salvador?
05:09 How does legacy financial structure impact farming stability?
09:01 How do you bypass banking intermediaries via a circular economy?
10:52 Why does physical proof of work require long-term capital?
17:09 How does El Salvador protect commodities from global inflation?
25:31 Why is specialty coffee cultivation analog proof of work?
32:00 What does the bitcoin supply cap teach us about scarcity?
45:24 How do you run a routing node and ASIC miners inside a business?
49:24 Why is Bitcoin Libre a direct challenge to central planning?

Live From Bitcoin Beach

]]>

item.title: Once Bitten! A Bitcoin Podcast. вАУ Exploring The State Of Exception Law In El Salvador - Riccardo Giorgio Frega - #615.
item.description:
El Salvador State of Exception Security Measure Extended for the 51st Consecutive Time.

$ BTC 62,579

Block Height 954,388

Today's guest on the show is Ricci Frega, an Italian activist and storyteller, who discusses his journey into Bitcoin, the issues surrounding El Salvador's Chivo Wallet, and the critical implications of the country's "State of Exception" law on privacy and human rights.

Key Topics:

  • Riccis background in activism and discovery of Bitcoin
  • The Bitcoin Italia Podcast and its focus on Bitcoin as a freedom technology
  • Critique of El Salvador's Chivo Wallet, including its centralization and transaction censorship
  • El Salvador's "State of Exception" law and the suspension of constitutional privacy rights
  • Lack of awareness and perceived double standards within the Bitcoin community regarding human rights in El Salvador
  • Call for prominent Bitcoiners to challenge the Salvadoran government on privacy issues
  • His views on stablecoins and their role in the Bitcoin ecosystem

A huge thank you to Ricci for coming on the show, follow his work below.

item.title: The Bitcoin Edge вАУ He Almost Missed Out By NOT Trusting Bitcoin- Manuel Azevedo
item.description:

item.title: Blockspace: AI & Bitcoin вАУ How the US Plans to Fast Track Data Centers, STRC Depegs from $100, Hive Signs $220M AI Deal
item.description:
Welcome back to The Blockspace Podcast! The Federal Energy Regulatory Commission has finalized new guidance aimed at fast tracking data centers across the U.S.. The rules arenвАЩt set-in-stone or enforceable yet, but the new guidance is the most significant regulatory action yet by the agency in the age of AI. For other news, we cover HiveвАЩs new $220 million AI contract and its pending acquisition of a 32 MW data center in Boden. Sweden. For interviews, we welcome Anchor Watch CEO Rob Hamilton to discuss why StrategyвАЩs STRC has fallen 10% over the last month from its targeted $100 price, and Bitcoin developer Hunter Beast joins us to discuss the latest in solutions for BitcoinвАЩs quantum computing threat. And finally. Luxor Head of Derivatives Matt Williams hops on to explain why AI data centers require a greater degree of hedging than bitcoin miners, and why the most recent round of GPU compute futures are solving for the wrong thing.¬†

Check out Dimetrics, the AI industryвАЩs Bloomberg terminal. Track financial metrics and news for AI stocks, GPU rental prices, state-by-state data center pushback, and more with the compute industryвАЩs most powerful dashboard.

Subscribe to our newsletter to receive updates for all of our shows and content.

рЯСЙCleanSpark (Nasdaq: CLSK), a market-leading data center developer with a proven track record of success.

рЯСЙLuxor, Blockspace's preferred mining pool. Start hashing today with Luxor!

рЯСЙLygos Finance, Borrow against your Bitcoin, without compromising on custody.

Energy Investors Forum is coming to Dallas on July 23, bringing together executives, operators, fund managers and investors across AI infrastructure, energy markets, data centers and bitcoin mining.

If you follow the business of power, compute and digital infrastructure, EIF is built to help you understand where these markets are heading and who is shaping them.

BlockSpace listeners can get 30% off all tickets with code BSP30 at checkout.

Register here: https://www.energyinvestorsforum.com/

Use code: BSP30

item.title: The Peter McCormack Show вАУ #187 - Danny Goler - DMT, Consciousness & Proof of the Simulation
item.description:
Danny Goler doesn't just argue we're living in a simulation - he claims he's found a way to interact with whoever is running it and that we are the AI they're training before we're "let out to play." His case for simulation theory is built on the hard problem of consciousness, the DMT "code," and a laser experiment that thousands of people say they can replicate.


In this interview we discuss idealism vs physicalism, whether AI can ever be conscious, the "architect" running infinite worlds to answer one unanswerable question, why he thinks the Ten Commandments were an alignment manual and what changes about how we should live if any of it is true.

item.title: Bitcoin Policy Institute вАУ Spotlight Series Ep. 2: Rep. Nick Begich
item.description:
Rep. Nick Begich (R-AK) reached Congress by an unusual route: founding software companies and holding Bitcoin since 2013. BPI's David Zell sat down with him at PubKey to talk about how a builder's instincts shape the way he legislates, his bill to give the U.S. a strategic Bitcoin reserve, and the policy questions AI is raising faster than Washington can answer them.


The conversation runs from Begich's 440 coins on Mt. Gox, to the American Reserve Modernization Act (ARMA), the ~93-year cycle of global reserve currencies, the "untethering" of money from scarcity, and why he believes AI's hardest problem is the "disintermediation of purpose" rather than unemployment. They close on UBI, Alaska's Permanent Fund as a model of citizen ownership, and what's next for the budget and healthcare.


Guest: Rep. Nick Begich (R-AK)

Host: David Zell, Bitcoin Policy Institute

Recorded at PubKey


CHAPTERS

0:00 Intro: A Founder Comes to Congress

1:21 From Baylor to Ford to Building a Software Company

5:17 Finding Bitcoin in 2013 & Surviving Mt. Gox

6:44 The Founder's Mindset vs. the Zero-Sum Worldview

13:56 ARMA: The Case for a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve

19:25 The "Untethering Event": Scarcity, Inflation & the Debt Spiral

25:58 AI's Promise, Peril & the "Disintermediation of Purpose"

31:59 Open-Source AI, China & Catastrophic Misuse Risk

39:14 Drawing the Regulatory Line & the "Bitcoin of AI"

42:25 UBI vs. Alaska's Permanent Fund: "Universal Basic Investment"

49:43 What's Next: The Budget, Healthcare & Quantum


#Bitcoin #BitcoinPolicy #ARMA #NickBegich #AIPolicy #DigitalAssets #StrategicBitcoinReserve #BPI #Crypto #MonetaryPolicy

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin & Beyond | Dein Geld neu denken вАУ Wie die Onlinebank ING ihren Biss verlor вАУ und welche Folgen das f√Љr die Kunden hat
item.description:
Die ING hat Banking in Deutschland mal modern gemacht: Als die niederl√§ndische Direktbank Ende der 1990er hierzulande gestartet ist, hat sie den Markt aufgemischt вАУ mit g√Љnstigen Geb√Љhren, ohne Filialnetz und mit einem Produkt, das damals ziemlich revolution√§r war: dem Tagesgeld. Heute ist von diesem Glanz allerdings nicht mehr viel √Љbrig. Die Konditionen wirken eher mittelm√§√Яig, die Konkurrenz wird st√§rker und st√§rker вАУ und die ING? Die scheint pl√ґtzlich ein wenig abgeh√§ngt. Doch geschlagen geben will sie sich nicht. Wir sprechen heute dar√Љber,

  • warum der einstige Banken-Star gerade so abgeschlagen aussieht,
  • bei welchen Anbietern ihr inzwischen deutlich bessere Angebote findet,
  • und ob Kunden bald mehr f√Љr ihr Girokonto zahlen m√Љssen.

item.itunes:summary:
Die ING hat Banking in Deutschland mal modern gemacht: Als die niederl√§ndische Direktbank Ende der 1990er hierzulande gestartet ist, hat sie den Markt aufgemischt вАУ mit g√Љnstigen Geb√Љhren, ohne Filialnetz und mit einem Produkt, das damals ziemlich revolution√§r war: dem Tagesgeld. Heute ist von diesem Glanz allerdings nicht mehr viel √Љbrig. Die Konditionen wirken eher mittelm√§√Яig, die Konkurrenz wird st√§rker und st√§rker вАУ und die ING? Die scheint pl√ґtzlich ein wenig abgeh√§ngt. Doch geschlagen geben will sie sich nicht. Wir sprechen heute dar√Љber,

  • warum der einstige Banken-Star gerade so abgeschlagen aussieht,
  • bei welchen Anbietern ihr inzwischen deutlich bessere Angebote findet,
  • und ob Kunden bald mehr f√Љr ihr Girokonto zahlen m√Љssen.

item.title: Bitcoin And | Bitcoin & Economic News вАУ Cathedral 2 | Clocks, Calendars, and Computers
item.description:
Episode 1146 of Bitcoin And . . . is back in the feed from the Bitcoin And archive. 
Bitcoin analysis and economics of bitcoin update. TodayвАЩs replay steps outside the normal bitcoin news cycle and continues the Cathedral project, a thousand-year silvopasture idea built around land, fertility, long-term productivity, and the kind of time preference that only starts to make sense when the money works again. 
Topics for today: 
  •  Why good money makes long-term projects imaginable again 
  •  The three laws behind the Cathedral project 
  •  Black walnut, black locust, and honey locust tree lanes 
  •  Hedgerows as living fences, wildlife habitat, and livestock control 
  •  Biochar, water retention, carbon storage, and soil fertility 
  •  Mycorrhizal fungi as an underground communications network 
  •  Hogs, nut crops, grazing lanes, and premium farm products 
  •  Cathedral as a clock, calendar, and living computer

item.title: The Bitcoin Layer вАУ I Woke Up Homeless With $75 When the Banks Took Everything | with Tony Yazbek
item.description: <![CDATA[In this episode, Nik welcomes Tony Yazbek, co-founder of The Bitcoin Way, for a conversation on why owning bitcoin yourself is the whole point. Tony argues that bitcoin is money rather than an investment, and that anything wrapped in legacy finance, from ETFs to exchange balances, is not the same as holding it directly. He recounts surviving Lebanon's 2019 banking collapse, when he woke up homeless with about $75 after the banks confiscated everyone's savings, and how it shaped his conviction. Tony and Nik also dig into what self-sovereignty does for people, how to think about hardware and air-gapped storage, the volatility myth, and jurisdictional sovereignty, with Tony drawing on 30 years in cybersecurity throughout.]]>

item.title: Store of Bitcoin - Bitcoin as Store of Value вАУ Ep. 49 - Daniel Batten | A new different wave of Bitcoin Adopters.
item.description:
In this episode of Store of Bitcoin, host Alessandro Ottaviani welcomes Daniel Batten, a prominent Bitcoin analyst and investor, to discuss the evolving narrative surrounding Bitcoin, particularly in relation to energy consumption and environmental impact. Daniel shares insights on how the mainstream media's perception of Bitcoin has shifted from skepticism to a more favorable view, largely due to rigorous research and advocacy from the Bitcoin community. He emphasizes the importance of effectively communicating Bitcoin's benefits to various stakeholders, including policymakers and investors, to foster broader adoption.

The conversation delves into the challenges of reaching new adopters, particularly those who may not be motivated by the same values that initially attracted early Bitcoin enthusiasts. Daniel highlights the need for a more nuanced approach to education and outreach, focusing on the social and environmental benefits of Bitcoin. He also discusses the potential for Bitcoin to serve as a tool for financial inclusion in developing countries, where it can provide a safeguard against inflation and empower individuals in oppressive regimes. The episode concludes with a look at future trends in Bitcoin adoption and the importance of aligning messaging with the values of diverse audiences.

item.title: Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock'n'Roll вАУ From Libra to AGI: Christian Catalini on the Future of Money
item.description:
In this episode of Bitcoin, Fiat & RockвАЩnвАЩRoll, co-host Jonas Gross and guest host Jonathan Knoll welcome Christian Catalini, one of the key architects behind FacebookвАЩs Libra project, former head economist at Meta, co-founder of Lightspark, founder of the MIT Crypto Economics Lab, and one of the most influential voices at the intersection of digital money, stablecoins, Bitcoin, and artificial intelligence.

The conversation begins with Libra: why it was built, why it failed, and why many of its core ideas are now resurfacing in todayвАЩs stablecoin regulation and infrastructure debates. Catalini reflects candidly on the projectвАЩs ambitions, its mistakes, its regulatory battles, and its lasting influence on frameworks such as the Genius Act. What looked premature in 2019 may now be becoming the foundation for the next phase of financial infrastructure.

From there, the discussion turns to the rapidly changing stablecoin landscape. Catalini explains why banks, payment networks, fintechs, and crypto-native companies are moving toward tokenized deposits, neutral stablecoin networks, and interoperable payment rails. The episode explores the role of the US dollar, the future of euro stablecoins, EuropeвАЩs regulatory challenges under MiCA, and why open, programmable infrastructure could reshape global payments.

The second half of the episode moves into AI and AGI. Drawing on his recent work on the economics of AGI, Catalini introduces the idea of verification as the central bottleneck in an economy where machines can generate endless output but humans still need to judge quality, safety, and trustworthiness. The conversation covers the future of junior jobs, education, financial services, AI agents, and why the next wave of innovation may depend on combining human judgment with increasingly powerful machine capabilities.

Finally, the episode returns to Bitcoin and open networks. Catalini shares his view on BitcoinвАЩs role as infrastructure, the risks of quantum computing, and why the original crypto vision of openness and interoperability still matters.

A wide-ranging conversation on LibraвАЩs legacy, stablecoins, AI, Bitcoin, and the future architecture of money.

item.title: M√Љnzweg - der Bitcoin-Podcast вАУ M√Љnzgasse #71 Auf der Suche nach Magic Internet Money (mit Jan-Paul, Lightrider & Lawrence)
item.description:
Manu hat in letzter Zeit viel erlebt, viel beobachtet вАУ und noch mehr Fragen im Kopf. Taugt Bitcoin wirklich als Zahlungsmittel im Alltag? Nicht als Theorie, nicht als Wunschdenken, sondern da drau√Яen, wo echte Menschen echtes Geld ausgeben?

F√Љr die letzte M√Љnzgasse vor der Sommerpause hat er sich deshalb drei G√§ste eingeladen, die diese Frage nicht aus dem Lehrbuch beantworten вАУ sondern aus dem Maschinenraum. Jan-Paul von Bitrefill, Lightrider von Nadanada und Lawrence von Shopinbit sitzen t√§glich mitten drin. Sie sehen die Zahlen, sie sp√Љren die Trends, und sie reden heute ungewohnt offen dar√Љber, was wirklich passiert, welches Geld ihre Kunden bevorzugen.

Diese Folge ist kein Hype, kein Bashing вАУ sie ist ein ehrlicher Blick auf den Stand der Dinge. Mit drei Unternehmen, die f√Љr sich selbst sprechen k√ґnnen, weil sie den Beweis tagt√§glich antreten m√Љssen.

Perfekt f√Љr alle, die weniger reden und mehr wissen wollen.

Einen sch√ґnen Sommer вАУ und bis nach der Pause.

item.itunes:summary:
Manu hat in letzter Zeit viel erlebt, viel beobachtet вАУ und noch mehr Fragen im Kopf. Taugt Bitcoin wirklich als Zahlungsmittel im Alltag? Nicht als Theorie, nicht als Wunschdenken, sondern da drau√Яen, wo echte Menschen echtes Geld ausgeben?

F√Љr die letzte M√Љnzgasse vor der Sommerpause hat er sich deshalb drei G√§ste eingeladen, die diese Frage nicht aus dem Lehrbuch beantworten вАУ sondern aus dem Maschinenraum. Jan-Paul von Bitrefill, Lightrider von Nadanada und Lawrence von Shopinbit sitzen t√§glich mitten drin. Sie sehen die Zahlen, sie sp√Љren die Trends, und sie reden heute ungewohnt offen dar√Љber, was wirklich passiert, welches Geld ihre Kunden bevorzugen.

Diese Folge ist kein Hype, kein Bashing вАУ sie ist ein ehrlicher Blick auf den Stand der Dinge. Mit drei Unternehmen, die f√Љr sich selbst sprechen k√ґnnen, weil sie den Beweis tagt√§glich antreten m√Љssen.

Perfekt f√Љr alle, die weniger reden und mehr wissen wollen.

Einen sch√ґnen Sommer вАУ und bis nach der Pause.

item.title: House of Satoshi - Bitcoin und Friends вАУ #59 CARF: Ausl√§ndische Krypto-Plattformen melden deine Daten - mit Thomas Linder
item.description:
**Diese Episode wird von PostFinance pr√§sentiert***

Dein Krypto-Update: Der monatliche Krypto-Newsletter von PostFinance ordnet die wichtigsten Entwicklungen rund um Bitcoin, Ethereum und Co. kompakt ein. рЯСЙ Jetzt abonnieren: https://www.postfinance.ch/de/privat/anlegen/moeglichkeiten/krypto/newsletter-abonnieren.html#/category?groupId=newsletter_krypto

********************************************************

Ab 2027 melden ausl√§ndische Krypto-Plattformen deine Daten automatisch an die Schweizer Steuerbeh√ґrde . Rino spricht mit Steuerspezialisten Thomas Linder von MME dar√Љber, was CARF konkret heisst, wer betroffen ist und warum jetzt der Moment zum Handeln ist.

Das Wichtigste in dieser Folge:

  • CARF l√§uft wie der AIA f√Љrs Bankkonto, einfach f√Љr Krypto. Nicht du meldest, sondern der Dienstleister.
  • Wer nie deklariert hat, sollte jetzt √Љber die straflose Selbstanzeige nachdenken. Danach drohen Bussen bis zum F√Љnffachen.
  • Self-Custody und DeFi bleiben vorerst aussen vor, ^und die USA f√§hrt ihr eigenes System.
  • Die gr√ґssere Frage ist die Privatsph√§re, ganz ohne breite Debatte durchgewunken.

Gast: Thomas Linder, Tax Partner bei MME, leitet dort das DLT-Team und ist seit zehn Jahren im Schweizer Krypto-Steuerrecht zu Hause.


Abonniere unseren Newsletter f√Љr Bitcoin-Insights, praktische Tipps und viel Wissen aus dem House of Satoshi: https://house-of-satoshi.ch/newsletter

]]>

item.title: The Bitcoin Infinity Show вАУ The Data Behind the BIP-110 Fight | Renaud Cuny | BIS #208
item.description:
Renaud Cuny joins the Bitcoin Infinity Show to talk about measuring the monetary health of the Bitcoin network through hard data, from the percentage of block space consumed by spam to the concentration of mining pools and hardware manufacturers. He walks through his Bitcoin Portal project, which scores decentralization and security across mining, block space, and node diversity, and explains why direction matters more than any single number. The conversation digs into BIP-110, the OP_RETURN debate, Bitcoin Knots adoption, hash renting through Ocean and Datum, and what self-custody and node-running mean for keeping Bitcoin sound money.

Connect with Renaud:

https://x.com/CunyRenaud

https://thebitcoinportal.com/

Connect with Us:

https://www.bitcoininfinityshow.com/

https://bitcoininfinitystore.com

https://primal.net/infinity

https://primal.net/knut

https://primal.net/luke

https://twitter.com/lukedewolf

item.title: Coin Stories with Natalie Brunell вАУ News Block: Digital Credit's Worst Day Ever, Warsh's New Fed Era Begins, Bitcoin's Community Attack Problem
item.description:
In this week's episode of the Coin Stories News Block powered exclusively by Ledn, we cover these major headlines related to Bitcoin, macroeconomics, and global finance:

  • Digital credit's worst day ever - what actually caused the STRC and SATA selloff and why it matters
  • The carry trade that blew up: how investors borrowing at 5% to earn 11.5% created a cascade
  • Kevin Warsh chairs his first Fed meeting, kills forward guidance, and launches five task forces
  • The Iran deal is already fraying вАФ Iran re-declares the Strait of Hormuz closed days after signing
  • A message to the Bitcoin community on recent in-fighting

----

Order Natalie's new book "Bitcoin is For Everyone," a simple introduction to Bitcoin and what's broken in our current financial system: https://amzn.to/3WzFzfU

----

----

item.title: Bitcoin Magazine Podcast вАУ Calle on Bitchat: Messaging When The Internet is Shut Down
item.description:
What happens to communication when the internet gets shut off? Frank Corva sits down with Calle вАФ creator of Cashu and a contributor to BitChat вАФ to unpack two of the most exciting open-source projects in Bitcoin. They dig into how Cashu ecash matured from experimental tech into a real economy, and why BitChat's Bluetooth mesh network took off in Jamaica, Iran, and Nepal. Calle also explains why ecash may become the native money of AI agents.



Grab your copy THE 2036 ISSUEрЯСЗhttps://store.bitcoinmagazine.com/pages/the-2036-issue

рЯФґ Frank Corva - Independent Content ProducerрЯФґ Creator of Cashu and contributor to BitChat



Chapters:


00:56 вАФ The state of Cashu ecash and building the foundation

02:07 вАФ Who's actually adopting ecash and why

03:26 вАФ Ecash as "pocket money" for AI agents

04:50 вАФ BitChat goes global: Jamaica, Iran, Nepal

05:35 вАФ Why "build it and they will come" isn't a law

07:45 вАФ Staying connected when the internet is shut down

09:00 вАФ How far BitChat's mesh network can really reach

11:32 вАФ Nostr, geohash chats, and going online

12:46 вАФ What's next: open-source AI agents



#Bitcoin #Cashu #BitChat #Ecash #Calle #MITBitcoinExpo #BitcoinPrivacy #MeshNetworking #Nostr #OpenSource #Bluetooth #AIagents #BitcoinMagazine #Satoshis #Privacy #DecentralizedTech #FreeSpeech #LightningNetwork #Meshtastic #BitcoinNews #SelfSovereign #BitcoinLayer2 #ZeusWallet #OfflineMessaging


DISCLAIMER: The views and opinions expressed in this show are those of the participants and do not necessarily reflect the official policy or position of BTC Inc., Bitcoin Magazine, or any affiliated entities. This content is provided for informational and educational purposes only and should not be construed as investment, legal, tax, or accounting advice. Nothing contained in this show constitutes a solicitation, recommendation, endorsement, or offer to buy or sell any securities or financial instruments. Viewers should consult their own advisors before making financial or business decisions.

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin Fortress вАУ BF221 - Top Bitcoin News - 6/21/26
item.description:
Date: June 21, 2026
Block Height: 954724
Moscow Time: 1560
Fees: 3 / 4 /5

¬†

In this episode:

In Episode 221 of The Bitcoin Fortress Podcast, we examine the biggest Bitcoin and macroeconomic developments from June 14th through June 21st, including rising tensions in the Middle East and their impact on markets, the Federal Reserve's latest policy stance, ETF flow dynamics, Strategy's continued Bitcoin accumulation, the growth of Bitcoin treasury companies, miner capitulation and AI infrastructure trends, pension fund adoption, regulatory developments surrounding the CLARITY Act, and the ongoing global liquidity debate. We also explore the major themes emerging from the Bitcoin podcast universe, feature Week 5 of the "A Bitcoin Way of Life" series, discuss all four Bitcoin Fortress books including the newly released The Architecture of Money, and close with reflections on why Bitcoin's reliability remains one of its greatest strengths in an increasingly uncertain world.

¬†

item.title: THE Bitcoin Podcast вАУ The Cypherpunk Revival: Bitcoin, AI, and Freedom Tech | Kyle Olney
item.description:
Kyle Olney joins THE Bitcoin Podcast to discuss Bitcoin policy, open-source software, AI, privacy, and the growing battle between freedom technology and government control.

We examine the Clarity Act and BRCA, what they mean for Bitcoin developers and privacy tools, and why developer protections are critical fight for the future of open-source innovation in America.

Kyle also explores the parallels between Bitcoin and AI, the risks of restricting access to advanced models (e.g. Anthropic's Fable), and why open-source technology is essential for preserving competition, privacy, and individual liberty.

Finally, we zoom out to discuss technological acceleration, generational leadership, the Fourth Turning, and the case for a modern cypherpunk revival.

If youвАЩre interested in Bitcoin, AI, privacy, and the future of freedom technology, this episode is for you.

item.title: bitcoin ist - Wissen statt FOMO вАУ 18) ... Deflation f√Љr alle
item.description:
Warum schlagen √Цkonomen und Zentralbanken sofort Alarm, wenn sie das Wort вАЮDeflationвАЬ h√ґren? Sie warnen vor Wirtschaftskrisen, hoher Arbeitslosigkeit und dem Zusammenbruch der M√§rkte. Und in unserem aktuellen Finanzsystem haben sie damit sogar recht вАУ allerdings tun sie damit dem Begriff der Deflation unrecht.

In dieser Folge von вАЮbitcoin ist...вАЬ schauen wir uns den Begriff der Deflation genauer an. Denn es gibt zwei Arten von Deflation: Eine, die ein krankes System kollabieren l√§sst, und eine, die der absolute Normalzustand der menschlichen Zivilisation sein sollte.

  • Der "Fehler" im System: Warum unser schuldenbasiertes Geldsystem Angst vor sinkenden Preisen hat und warum Kredite niemals вАЮteurerвАЬ werden d√Љrfen.

  • Die gute Deflation: Wie der technologische Fortschritt (vom Rad bis zum Internet) unser Leben nat√Љrlicherweise immer effizienter und g√Љnstiger machen m√Љsste.

  • Das 2%-Mantra: Warum Zentralbanken die Geldmenge k√Љnstlich ausweiten, um den Produktivit√§tsgewinn deiner Lebenszeit unbemerkt abzusch√ґpfen.

  • Bitcoin als L√ґsung: Wie eine absolut begrenzte Geldmenge von 21 Millionen Einheiten daf√Љr sorgt, dass der menschliche Fortschritt endlich wieder direkt in deinem Geldbeutel landet.

вАЮDie Zentralbanken bek√§mpfen die schlechte Deflation, indem sie permanent Geld drucken. Doch damit zerst√ґren sie gleichzeitig die gute Deflation вАУ sie fressen den technologischen Fortschritt einfach auf und verw√§ssern unsere Kaufkraft schleichend.вАЬ

Alles von "bitcoin ist..." Hier geht es zu allen meinen Kan√§len: https://linktr.ee/bitcoinist

Einsteiger-Spezial: m√ґchtest du wissen, WIE man bitcoin sicher kauft und verwahrt? kostenlose und sichere Kaufanleitung direkt in dein Postfach

Hinterlasse mir gerne eine 5-Sterne-Bewertung oder einen Kommentar. Danke, Dein Christian.


]]>

item.title: State of Bitcoin with Brandon Keys вАУ The European Bitcoin Ban Hiding In Plain Sight with Matyas Kuchar - State of Bitcoin Ep. 238
item.description:
Until last year, more than 1,000 restaurants in Czech Republic accepted Bitcoin. Then it all stopped.

The MiCA regulation didn't ban Bitcoin in Europe. It did something far more effective вАФ it made the rails impossible to operate. And as the Czech merchant economy quietly disappeared, two bigger forces started moving in the background: the petrodollar dying, and CBDCs coming online in Europe THIS YEAR.

In this episode, I sit down with Matyas Kuchar вАФ co-founder of BTC Prague, the largest Bitcoin-only conference in Europe, and one of the most thoughtful voices on European Bitcoin policy вАФ to break down why Czech Republic became the Bitcoin capital of Europe, why the European surveillance state is spreading faster than Americans realize, and why he believes Bitcoin must win because the alternative is just so much worse.

You'll learn:

вЖТ How MiCA quietly killed 1,000+ Bitcoin-accepting restaurants in Czech Republic вАФ and why it wasn't even a direct ban

вЖТ Why Czech Republic became the Bitcoin capital of Europe (Trezor, Slush Pool, BIP-39, General Bytes вАФ all started in Prague)

вЖТ Why the petrodollar is dying вАФ and what the loss of US hegemony means for global decentralization

вЖТ Why Europeans use Bitcoin as money while Americans treat it as digital gold вАФ and which approach is right

вЖТ The European CBDC threat: pilots are launching THIS YEAR вАФ and why most Americans haven't heard about it

вЖТ The CBDC mechanism in Matyas's words: "You can analyze, you can control, you can surveil, you can send from a helicopter"

вЖТ Why even an anarcho-capitalist now meets with politicians вАФ and what changed his mind

вЖТ Why Bitcoin is no longer just savings вАФ it's the network of people building the future you actually want to live in

рЯЪ® JOIN ME AT BTC PRAGUE 2026

The largest Bitcoin-only conference in Europe вАФ June 11-13. Use code GREENCANDLE for discounted tickets:

https://btcprague.com/

рЯОѓ PROTECT YOUR BITCOIN WITH SALT LENDING

Borrow against your Bitcoin without selling a single sat. Green Candle viewers get an exclusive offer:

https://saltlending.com/green-candle

рЯОѓ PLAN YOUR WEALTH WITH STRONG WEALTH

Build a Bitcoin-aligned wealth strategy вАФ estate planning, tax optimization, portfolio construction:

https://strongwealth.net/

рЯОѓ MINE BITCOIN WITH SIMPLE MINING

First-year repairs free for Green Candle listeners:

https://simplemining.io/green-candle

рЯУК REFERENCED IN THIS EPISODE

вАҐ MiCA regulation (EU 2023/1114) вАФ Markets in Crypto-Assets framework

вАҐ Czech Republic Bitcoin tax exemption (3-year hold rule)

вАҐ Slush Pool (founded 2010 in Prague, first ever Bitcoin mining pool)

вАҐ BIP-39 seed phrase standard (developed in Prague)

вАҐ Trezor hardware wallet (first ever, founded in Prague)

вАҐ EU CBDC pilot programs (launching 2026)

вАҐ BTC Prague 2026 conference вАФ June 11-13

Bitcoin #BTCPrague #Matyas #MiCA #BitcoinEurope #CBDC #BitcoinPolicy #EuropeanBitcoin #BitcoinConference #SoundMoney #Petrodollar #BitcoinAdoption #CzechRepublic #FinancialFreedom #BitcoinNews

рЯФФ SUBSCRIBE for weekly Bitcoin, macro, and personal finance content.

вЪ†пЄП Disclaimer: This video is for informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Always do your own research.

item.title: The Bitcoin Way Podcast вАУ UK Social Media Ban: Welcome to OrwellвАЩs 1984 | Bitcoin Banter
item.description:
Learn how to take 100% self-custody of your Bitcoin:

https://www.thebitcoinway.com/services/bitcoin-self-custody-training?utm_source=tbw&utm_medium=fountain&utm_campaign=bitcoin-banter&utm_content=video-desc

Secure your digital life with personal cybersecurity:

https://www.thebitcoinway.com/services/personal-cybersecurity?utm_source=tbw&utm_medium=fountain&utm_campaign=bitcoin-banter&utm_content=video-desc

Schedule a FREE call: http://www.thebitcoinway.com/contact?utm_campaign=bitcoin-banter&utm_medium=social&utm_source=fountain&utm_term=bitcoin-banter

Subscribe to our newsletter: https://www.thebitcoinway.com/resources/newsletter?utm_campaign=bitcoin-banter&utm_medium=social&utm_source=fountain

The UK social media ban is here вАФ and itвАЩs a warning sign for the rest of us. In this weekвАЩs Bitcoin Banter, Tony and Katie join Michael to break down Keir StarmerвАЩs Labour government plan to ban social media for under-16s, and the unintended (or intended?) consequences for online privacy, free speech, and digital freedom in OrwellвАЩs 1984 Britain.

The team also unpacks the rise of the worldвАЩs first trillionaire, Elon Musk; the dangerous concentration of the S&P 500 in a handful of AI stocks; the Trump familyвАЩs crypto windfall while everyday investors lose out; and of course our Donkey of the Week, whoвАЩs begging Trump for a presidential pardon.

From Big Brother Britain to taking self-custody of your Bitcoin, this episode is about protecting your money, your privacy, and your freedom.

вП±пЄП TIMESTAMPS:

00:00 Intro

01:01 UK to enact social media ban for under 16s

08:28 UK also wants to ban VPNs

12:25 Elon Musk is the worldвАЩs first trillionaire

16:40 S&P500 AI-related stock concentration reportedly at 49%

20:18 Trump family profit from crypto while investors lose

23:39 Our Donkey of the week wants a Presidential Pardon

Sie diskutieren die Bitcoin-Adoption, die Adopting Bitcoin-Konferenz, die Sicherheitslage, die allt√§gliche Nutzung von Bitcoin und die politische Situation unter Pr√§sident Bukele.

item.title: The Bitcoin Treasury Podcast вАУ The Tax-Free Bitcoin Secret That Just Became Possible (Explained)
item.description:
Brian Phillips built the country's first Bitcoin-only Opportunity Zone fund. Tim Enneking ran his own OZ fund at a near ten-digit family office for nine years вАФ and had never thought to combine the two.

In this Psalion series episode, Tim and Alec Beckman sit down with Brian to walk through a structure that lets long-term Bitcoin holders exit completely tax-free after a 10-year hold, with a 30-year window, 30-day liquidity, and trust mechanics that pass the clock to heirs. They cover the One Big Beautiful Bill's rolling 5-year deferral, the wash-sale window Bitcoin holders can still exploit, Tim's advice for Saylor, and why Brian's synthesis of TradFi tax law and Bitcoin antithesis is вАФ in Tim's words вАФ the ultimate Hegelian synthesis fund.

Institutional stack: Anchorage Digital, Morgan Stanley, HC Global, Deloitte.

Follow Psalion: https://psalion.com
Learn more about Psalion Yield
and the groundbreaking Psalion Lend -- where you keep custody of your bitcoin at market-leading rates

Follow Pearl Bitcoin Fund: https://thepearl.fund

¬†

рЯУК Track every Bitcoin treasury company at bitcointreasuries.net

вЪ†пЄП Not financial advice. Do your own research.

¬†
